subject: refactor(theme): migrate 14 medium components to Uniwind + DaisyUI tokens
body:
Convert BottomSheet, Toast, BurgerMenu, PriceDisplay, StationCard,
StationList, TutorialModal, InstallPrompt, InstallInstructionsModal,
LocationSearch, PriceHistoryChart, PriceEditor, admin station edit,
and admin index from StyleSheet + useAppTheme to Uniwind className
with DaisyUI semantic classes.

Pattern: useTheme().colors for hex values (icons, indicators),
className for View/Text styling (bg-base-100, text-primary, etc.),
PRICE_COLORS for domain-specific staleness indicators.

Two admin screens (bulk-import, bulk-update) remain for next commit.

Tags: theme, daisyui, uniwind, refactor, migration
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
